codeReview.summary: The commit replaces the previous multi-pass counting logic with a single reduce in `getResultFilterCounts`, preserves the expected count object shape, and extends tests to cover all duplicate variants aggregating into the duplicate bucket. No blocking or non-blocking defects were identified in scope.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill expectations, and commit diff for `m6-single-reduce-filter-counts`. Implementation satisfies the feature description and expected behavior with no actionable issues found.
